title: Long-Form YouTube Video Editor
desc: I run an education-focused YouTube channel that publishes 10–20-minute, documentary-style episodes every week. I’m looking for a full-time, remote editor who can take raw footage and shape it into a tight, story-driven narrative that keeps viewers watching to the very last second. You should already be comfortable working at an intermediate to expert level inside Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects, Photoshop, and Audition. Beyond simple cutting, I expect thoughtful storytelling, engaging motion graphics, polished sound design, accurate color correction, and all the little retention tricks that turn casual viewers into loyal subscribers. Because this is a long-form format, pacing and structure matter as much as technical polish. If you’ve previously edited education or documentary content for YouTube—and can point to clear performance results—you’ll feel right at home here. Please send me: • A link to your portfolio and any relevant YouTube work • A brief note on the specific role you played in each sample • Your expected monthly salary and earliest start date I review every application personally and will reach out to shortlisted editors for a paid test project. Looking forward to seeing how you can elevate our next episode.

title: Masterclass Video Editing Specialist
desc: Overview We're a Nordic C-suite peer-learning company and have recorded a ~90-minute CFO masterclass: a short host intro, two CFOs walking through their financial setups via screen share (≈30 min each), and a ~30-min audience Q&A. We need it edited into a polished, engaging video that feels alive — not a static meeting capture. This is the first in a recurring series, so we're looking for someone we can keep working with. Footage you'll receive Screen recording (Full HD) — the presenters' screens; this is the primary visual during the two walkthroughs. 1–2 camera angles (Full HD, horizontal 16:9, 25/30fps) — presenter and room. Multitrack audio (Nomono): one clean WAV per speaker + a room/ambient track. Use the per-speaker tracks as the primary audio. A Google Meet recording — as a sync reference and backup only. Scope & editing direction Sync all camera angles + the screen recording to the audio (a hand-clap marks the start of each segment). Cut to a rhythm that keeps ~90 minutes feeling lively — natural cuts between angles, never static. When a presenter refers to something on screen, show the screen share. During Q&A, cut to the room / the person asking. Light audio balancing (the Nomono tracks are already AI-enhanced; level voices as needed). Keep it clean and minimal, no hea

title: Modern Academic Portfolio Design
desc: I’m finishing my master’s here in the United States and I want a polished, modern-style academic portfolio that presents my work clearly and looks impressive when shared with faculty, potential PhD advisers, and employers. I’d like a version that reads beautifully onscreen (interactive PDF or lightweight web PDF) and an editable source file so I can swap pieces in and out as new work appears. If you prefer tools such as Adobe InDesign, Illustrator, Figma, or even LaTeX with a sleek template, let me know; I’m flexible as long as the final look is professional and consistent. Acceptance criteria 1. Modern visual style with coherent typography and color palette 2. All four sections included and logically ordered 3. Delivered as high-resolution PDF plus editable file (INDD, Figma, or similar) 4. Fonts and assets either free for academic use or p

title: Monthly Fast-Paced Reel Editing
desc: Each month I produce a batch of raw educational footage that must be shaped into 30 polished, professional reels. Every video needs to run no longer than 60 seconds and carry a brisk, attention-holding rhythm—think quick cuts, punchy transitions, and on-screen text that reinforces the key teaching points without overwhelming the viewer. The finished clips will live primarily on Instagram Reels and YouTube Shorts, so vertical 9:16 framing, crisp captions, and platform-friendly formatting are essential. Color grade, audio balance, and subtle motion graphics should all work together to keep the content looking premium yet approachable. Here’s how I see the collaboration working: • I deliver the raw footage, talking-points script, and any brand assets at the start of each month. • You edit, add dynamic text, soundtrack, and light graphics, then share a first draft reel for review. • Up to one revision round per reel keeps the workflow moving quickly. • Final exports arrive as high-quality MP4s plus the editable project files for backup. The total monthly budget is 5,000 inr, paid once all 30 reels are signed off. If you’re comfortable turning around fast-paced educational edits on this schedule, let’s talk timeframe and preferred software—Premiere Pro, Final Cut, DaVinci Resolve, or

title: Premium Handcrafted Goods Packaging Design

title: Preschool Reels & Posts Editing
desc: I run a preschool page on Instagram and need a reliable video editor who can turn the daily footage I upload to Google Drive into one engaging post and one lively reel every single day. The overall vibe I’m after is fun and energetic, so please feel free to play with pace, bright transitions, and upbeat cuts that keep little viewers—and their parents—smiling. Each edit should feature: • Light, playful animations that add character without overwhelming the scene • Clear text overlays for key words or quick tips • Royalty-free background music that fits the cheerful, child-friendly tone I don’t have a fixed color palette, so you’re welcome to choose hues that pop and complement each clip. If you enjoy working in Canva, that’s a bonus; many of my visual assets live there already and it streamlines collaboration. Deliverable timeline: • 1 square or portrait post (feed-ready) per day • 1 vertical reel (up to 30 s) per day Once the files are uploaded, I’ll share a quick note with any clip-specific ideas; beyond that, creative freedom is yours. Looking forward to seeing how you bring these preschool moments to life! Price mentioned is offered for monthly salary

title: Presentation Designer to Build a Branded Keynote Deck in PowerPoint
desc: I am a practicing attorney speaking at a national education conference in June. I need a designer to build a clean, editorial presentation in PowerPoint from content I provide. This is a design and layout job, not a writing job. I will give you the full script and slide content. You make it look sharp and on brand. Scope and deliverables ∙ A slide presentation built in Microsoft PowerPoint or Canva ∙ Title slide, section dividers, content slides, and a closing slide with my contact information ∙ Layouts that handle text, simple data points, and pull quotes ∙ Editable .pptx file with the fonts and brand colors set in the slide master, so I can make small edits myself later ∙ Source files for any custom graphics Brand and style direction ∙ Aesthetic is institutional and editorial. Think the restraint of a top law firm, not a sales pitch. Clean type, generous white space, no clip art, no stock-photo clutter, no heavy gradients or animations. ∙ Typeface is Georgia throughout. ∙ Color palette: Olive #3C3207, Cream #F4EFE6, Charcoal #1A1A1A, Forest Green #1C3A2E, with Oxblood #6B2417 as a sparing accent. ∙ I will provide my logo and exact brand specifications once we connect. What I will provide ∙ The full written content and speaking notes ∙ My logo files, color palette, and headshot

title: Spiritual Reels & Shorts Editing
desc: I record 30–60-minute videos filled with spiritual reflections, practical life lessons, and bite-size information that my audience loves to revisit during the day. I now want to turn each long episode into a set of engaging 30- to 60-second reels/shorts suitable for YouTube Shorts, Instagram Reels, and similar platforms. Your task is to watch the full recording, pick out the most impactful moments, and edit them into polished vertical clips with captions, subtle branding, light background music (when it serves the message), and seamless transitions. Please retain the calm, uplifting tone of the original footage while keeping the final pace snappy enough for short-form viewers. I am comfortable with whichever tool you prefer—Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut, DaVinci Resolve, CapCut, etc.—as long as the output is crisp, properly formatted (1080 × 1920), and instantly publishable. Deliverables • A batch of short-form clips (30–60 sec each) exported in MP4 and one editable project file. • Simple SRT or burned-in subtitles synced accurately to speech. • A quick preview sheet (timestamps + one-line context) so I know where each clip was pulled from. Acceptance criteria • All clips match the original audio levels and color tone; no abrupt cuts or dead air. • Text overlays remain legible on

title: Tutorial Video Intro Motion Graphics
desc: I have a raw tutorial video plus a separate voice track from the professor that needs to be married together and finished with a short, professional-and-clean intro animation. The goal is a polished learning asset that flows smoothly from branded opener to closing frame. Here’s what I need from you: • Design a 5-7 second intro animation in a professional, clean style (logo and colour palette supplied). • Sync and mix the professor’s audio track with the existing footage, balancing levels and removing background noise. • Trim minor hesitations and tidy transitions so the lesson feels seamless. • Deliver the final video in 1080p (MP4) along with the project files (Premiere Pro / After Effects or equivalent). Colour grading and light text call-outs are welcome if they help clarity, but the primary focus is that intro animation and the precise audio integration. If this sounds straightforward for your toolset—Premiere Pro, After Effects, DaVinci Resolve, or similar—I’d love to see a quick reel or link that shows comparable work. Turnaround within a week is ideal; let me know if that fits your schedule.

title: Urgent Enrollment Form Design
desc: I need a clean, classic, and professional class enrollment form created and delivered today. The form’s main job is to collect student information quickly and neatly, so the layout must be intuitive and printer-friendly while still looking polished. You’ll receive a few reference images that show the general structure I like. Please merge those ideas into one cohesive design and present the finished form in both PDF and editable Word formats. The final document must include these sections in clear, logical order: Student Details, Course Selection, Contact Information, and Terms & Signature. Branding requirements: • Integrate my logo. • Apply the specific colors I’ll provide. Other essentials: • Fonts and spacing should feel refined yet easy to read—think straightforward classics, not decorative styles. • Page size: standard US Letter (8.5" × 11"), with margins that allow for effortless printing. • All fields should have enough room to hand-write responses. Deadline is critical. I need first proof within a few hours of award and the final, print-ready files the same day. If you can start immediately and meet this schedule, include the phrase “READY TO START NOW” in your bid along with your turnaround estimate.

title: Video Editor + Motion Graphics Animator
desc: Job Title Video Editor + Motion Graphics Animator (Infrastructure / Public Safety Explainer) ⸻ Job Description We’re looking for a skilled video editor with motion graphics experience to help us produce a short explainer video (2–3 minutes) for a public-safety infrastructure product related to wildfire prevention. This is not a hype video or social reel. It’s a clear, credible, technically accurate explainer intended for investors, policymakers, utilities, and fire professionals. You’ll be working from a fully written script and storyboard outline. Your role is to bring clarity and visual structure through clean editing, diagrams, and light animation. ⸻ Scope of Work Editing • Assemble a 2–3 minute explainer video from supplied assets • Clean, professional pacing (documentary / explainer style) • Subtle sound design and music (not dramatic or overproduced) Motion Graphics / Animation • Simple animated diagrams to explain: • Municipal water system pressure loss • Broken building plumbing causing uncontrolled water leaks • Automatic shut-off triggered by fire exposure • On-screen callouts (numbers, flow arrows, pressure drop) • Minimalist style — clarity over flash Visual Style • Serious, credible, public-infrastructure tone • Think: Vox explainer / Kurzgesagt (but more grounded) •

Each episode needs brisk, energetic pacing—quick cuts, punchy transitions, and the kind of visual rhythm that keeps viewers glued for every plot twist. I also want subtle animated graphics woven in to highlight key scenes or concepts, giving the recap extra flair without overwhelming the footage. Here’s how the workflow will look: I supply the raw voice-over, movie clips, and a rough beat sheet. Your task is to craft a polished 8-12-minute edit in 1080p, sync everything to the script, layer in suitable royalty-free SFX or risers if you feel they boost impact, and hand back both the final render and the project file so we can refine future episodes more quickly. I’m still a student, so the budget starts lean, but consistency is guaranteed—expect a new video every week. As watch time and ad revenue climb, the rate will climb with it. Clear, friendly communication is important to me, and I always keep deadlines realistic so no one scrambles at the last minute. Deliverables per episode: • Final video (H.264, 1080p, 25-30 fps) • Project file with all media relinked • Any custom animated assets created If high-energy edits and futuristic storytelling speak to you, let’s build a chan

We want his face to be the main thing on the t-shirt. with some of his favourite things on the outside. Caravan, cars, gadgets, bikes, money

title: AristiCon 2026 Cybersecurity Themed T-Shirt Design
desc: Hi, We need a t-shirt design made for our internal cybersecurity conference titled AristiCon 2026. I have attached the brand guide for certain colours and logos. As for the themes,, we have two possible themes - "Secure your Shizzle", or "Mind your own privileges". One of our team members generated some potential concept art using AI which has also been attached (please don't just copy these, it was mainly to get the ideas rolling in our team). For reference, I have also provided last year's conference design mock-ups as well as the actual t-shirt design that was printed (ignore the crumpled t-shirt!). Some things to bear in mind - I don't want the design to be overly complex. If the theme could be incorporated somehow (either title or integrated into the design). I don't want it too messy. It should look relatively clean and not complex. It should also look good on a t shirt :D

title: Bold Typography Graphic Tees Design
desc: I'm looking for a creative streetwear t-shirt designer specializing in graphic tees. The designs should prominently feature bold and chunky typography. Key requirements: - Expertise in streetwear trends - Strong typography skills - Experience with bold and chunky fonts Please provide a portfolio showcasing relevant work.

title: Canva Designer Needed for Clothing Brand
desc: Hi, I'm looking for a Canva designer to create a few simple social media posts for my clothing brand. This is a small task to start with, but there may be more work available if we're a good fit. I already have the content and brand style in mind. I just need someone who can turn the ideas into clean, attractive designs that match the brand's look and feel. If you're interested, please send a few samples of your work and tell me a little about your experience with Canva. Looking forward to hearing from you.

title: Create Engaging Banner Ads for App
desc: Banner Ad Designer Needed for Mobile App (Meta / TikTok / IG Ads) I'm looking for an experienced graphic designer to create high-converting banner ads and social ad creatives for our mobile app. The ideal designer understands: Modern app marketing aesthetics Meta / Instagram / TikTok ad formats Clean and premium layouts Conversion-focused creative Social-first mobile design What We Need: Static banner ads Story ads Feed creatives App promotion visuals Waitlist / launch campaign creatives Multiple ad variations for testing Style Direction We’re looking for: Premium and modern visuals Clean typography Strong mobile-first layouts Electronic music / nightlife inspired aesthetic Minimal but eye-catching design High-end startup feel Requirements Experience designing ads for apps/startups Portfolio with social media ads or mobile app campaigns Understanding of Meta & TikTok ad sizing Fast communication Ability to deliver editable source files (Figma preferred) Bonus Experience with nightlife, music, fashion, or Gen Z brands Motion graphics or animated ads Understanding of performance marketing creatives To Apply Please send: Portfolio Examples of app ads or banner work Your rates Turnaround time Whether you also create animated creatives Long-term work possible for the right designer.

title: Creative Streetwear T-Shirt Designer Needed for Wearable Typography & Everyday Humor Brand
desc: We are a clothing store, a new everyday clothing brand focused on simple, cool, wearable T-shirts for real people. We are looking for a talented T-shirt designer who can create strong, wearable graphic tee concepts for our online store. What we need We need someone who can design T-shirt graphics that feel: Cool and wearable Funny but not childish Modern and clean Suitable for everyday casual outfits Some cool icons should be incorporated Design styles we like: Minimal illustrations Streetwear catalogue style Funny everyday slogans Some sample slogan directions: “I Promise I Look Better in Photos” “I Used to Be Sad Until I Bought This T-Shirt. Now I’m Cool and Sad.” 'Just a simple illustration of an avocado ' We want designs that feel like they belong in a modern casual clothing store, not generic Etsy-style clipart. Deliverables Initial 5 test design and then 20 approved and final designs continously.

title: Design for t-shirt printing (Company branding)
desc: Hello, I am looking for a freelance graphic designer to create a professional design for t-shirt printing for my company. The goal is to create a clean, impactful, and readable visual. I will provide all the necessary materials, including: The company logo The phone number The website Optionally, a slogan Deliverables: Vector file (AI, EPS, or SVG) Print-ready format (compatible with platforms like VistaPrint) Optimized version for textile printing (good readability, contrast, placement) Style: Modern Professional Visually strong and easy to recognize Please include in your proposal: Your portfolio Examples of similar branding or t-shirt designs This is a one-time project with potential for future collaboration. Thank you!

title: Digital Imitation Jewellery Catalogue
desc: I own a fast-growing imitation jewellery brand and I’m ready to showcase the new collection in a polished digital catalogue that I can push straight to social media. The goal is a visually rich, scroll-stopping piece that works perfectly as an Instagram carousel, Facebook post, and story highlight while still living on in a shareable PDF. Here’s what I need from you: • A cohesive concept and layout that mirrors the sparkle and colour of our pieces, using on-trend typography and plenty of white space so the jewellery remains centre stage. • Final files sized for popular social platforms (1080×1350 px portrait and 1080×1080 px square) plus a hi-res PDF for download. • Editable source files—Adobe InDesign, Photoshop, or Canva are all fine—so my team can update pricing later. • Quick turnaround; I’d like to publish this as soon as possible, so efficiency is key. I can provide product photos, descriptions, and basic brand guidelines immediately. If you have a flair for jewellery or fashion layouts and know how to optimise designs for social feeds, let’s get this sparkle online fast.

title: Ecom Video Editor for Meta & TikTok Ads
desc: About Us: We are a dynamic and rapidly growing 7-figure women's jewelry brand powered by Shopify. We are passionate about great design that speaks for itself, drawing inspiration from everyday fashion and influencers, and genuinely caring about the products we create and the relationships we build. Our marketing is performance-driven, and high-converting video creative is central to our scaling strategy. The Role: We're seeking a skilled and agile E-commerce Response Video Editor (full time / 40 hours per week) who understands how to create video ads that don't just look good but convert. You will work in lockstep with our Creative Strategist, taking raw footage (UGC, potentially studio shots) and briefs to produce engaging, platform-optimized video ads primarily for Meta (Facebook/Instagram) and TikTok. Your job is to execute rapidly, iterate effectively based on performance insights (provided by the strategist), and ensure the final output is engineered for maximum engagement and conversions. Forget long-form content; this is about short, punchy, direct-response video. IMPORTANT: This is not a role for someone juggling multiple jobs, working for or running a freelancing agency, or managing several clients at once. We are looking for a dedicated full-time video editor who will w

title: Ecommerce marketing specialist needed — jewelry brand, Shopify, Meta ads
desc: Hi, I'm Jacques, founder of Vara Studio — we sell accessible gold jewelry with natural and lab-grown gemstones. Think everyday pieces, not occasion-only. Our Shopify store has been live for a while but honestly the sales aren't where they should be. We've put some budget into Meta and Google in the past with pretty disappointing results and I'm trying to figure out if the problem was execution, strategy, or something else entirely. I'm not looking for someone to just run ads. I want to talk to someone who can look at what we have, tell me what's broken, and propose a realistic plan to actually get this moving. Budget for ads is in the $1,000–1,500/month range. Before I invite anyone to interview I'd like you to answer a few questions below — just so I understand how you work before we spend time on a call. 1. Have you worked with a jewelry or accessories brand on Shopify before? Tell me about the brand — what was the situation when you came in and what did you actually do? 2. We've spent around $1,000/month on Meta before and got very little back. What are the most common reasons that happens, in your experience? 3. If you were starting fresh with a Shopify jewelry store and a $1,200/month ad budget — no purchase history in the pixel, maybe 200 visitors/month organic — what would

title: Edit and Convert PNG to Vector Files
desc: We run a girls softball touranment event company and we are designing 6 different event tshirts. We need someone to take PNG images, incorporate our edits and return a vector file we can send to our tshirt printer.

title: Experienced T-Shirt Designer for Print-Ready Merch (POD & E-commerce)

This project is for someone who can create clean, original, print-ready designs that work well for print-on-demand platforms and online stores (Etsy, Shopify, Amazon Merch). We are not looking for generic designs or copied styles. We want a designer who understands what sells, how designs look on real shirts, and how to prepare files correctly for printing. WHAT WE’RE REALLY LOOKING FOR ✔ Someone experienced with T-shirt & merch design ✔ Strong understanding of print quality (300 DPI, transparent background) ✔ Ability to follow brand style and niche direction ✔ Designs that look good on the product, not just on screen ✔ Clean typography and/or illustration skills ✔ Knows how POD platforms work (Printify, Printful, etc.) REQUIRED DELIVERABLES Custom T-shirt design (original work only) Print-ready files (PNG / JPG, 300 DPI) Transparent background version Scalable source file (AI or PSD preferred) T-shirt mockup for preview TO APPLY, PLEASE INCLUDE Examples of previous T-shirt or apparel designs Your experience with POD or merch stores (if any) Estimated turnaround time per design Applications without relevant samples will not be considered. The ideal candidate will have experience in graphic design and illustration, and be able to deliver a high-quality design that can be printed on t-shirts. The project is expected to be completed within a week.

title: Fashion Ad Creative Designer — Video & Static Ads for Women's Fashion E-Commerce
desc: We run multiple women's fashion e-commerce brands generating $300K+/month in revenue. We need a skilled fashion creative designer to produce high-converting ad creatives for our paid advertising campaigns across Meta (Facebook/Instagram), TikTok, Google, and Pinterest. This role requires someone who understands fashion advertising — not just design. We need creatives that stop the scroll, tell a visual story, and drive purchases. Scope of Work: — Create 15–20 ad creatives per week (mix of video and static) — Short-form video ads (15–30 seconds) for Meta, TikTok, and Reels — Static image ads and carousel ads for Meta and Pinterest — UGC-style product showcase videos — Lifestyle and trend-based fashion content — A/B test variations with different hooks, angles, and CTAs — Competitor research using Meta Ad Library and TikTok Creative Center Required Skills: — Portfolio showing fashion-specific ad creatives (not generic design work) — Video editing: CapCut, Premiere Pro, or After Effects — Image design: Canva Pro, Photoshop, or Figma — AI image generation: Midjourney, Krea AI, Leonardo, or similar — Understanding of Meta/Facebook ad specs and best practices — Strong fashion sense and understanding of women's fashion trends — Fast turnaround without compromising quality Preferred: — E

You'll be creating a range of assets across: EDMs (Klaviyo) Website banners and graphics In-store signage Social media assets Sale campaigns and collection launches Packaging and other brand assets We're looking for someone with: Experience designing for fashion, lifestyle, or retail brands Strong skills in Klaviyo, Photoshop, Canva, and Adobe Creative Suite An eye for typography, layout, colour, and storytelling The ability to work within an established brand while bringing fresh ideas and creative direction Understanding of customer-focused design and conversion-driven marketing Our aesthetic is feminine, bohemian, and vintage-inspired, so we'd love to see examples of work that aligns with a similar style. title: Footwear Packaging Design (shoe box) Needed
desc: Hi there! I own a footwear company called Cypher Pickleball and we are releasing a new, premium performance shoe for court sports November of this year. Because the shoe is premium ($160 price point) with emphasis on increased performance, speed, and comfort features, we want the shoe box to be designed in a way that speaks to the quality of the product inside. I'm looking for someone who will take a few minutes to understand where our brand has been, where it's going, and to sympathize with how important the customer experience is. The shoe box is the first thing customers see upon opening their package, so if we can align on branding, we can be more successful. Thank you for your time and look forward to reading your proposal!
